items.name: djinni
items.get_refuse_string: The 10 foot tall djinni glares at you.

rooms.name: Tower Cell
rooms.description: in a cramped stone cell at the top of a lonely tower. A magic ladder along the wall hums with soft blue light and leads up into the cloudy distance.

items.name: torch
items.lit_state_description: an old wooden torch that is burning brightly, casting flickering shadows on the walls.

items.name: bean
items.open_action_description: You crack open the bean with a satisfying snap.

items.name: broach
items.open_action_description: You open the ornate broach, revealing an ivory carving of a favorite pet fish.
items.opened_state_description: an ornate broach with an ivory carving of a favorite pet fish.
items.closed_state_description: an ornate broach with a tightly-closed clasp.

items.name: trapdoor
items.locked_state_description: a rusty iron trapdoor in the middle of the floor. The trap door is closed and locked.
items.unlocked_state_description: a rusty iron trapdoor in the middle of the floor. The trap door is closed but unlocked.
items.unlockable_description: The trapdoor is locked and you need a key.
items.closed_state_description: a rusty iron trapdoor in the middle of the floor. The trap door is closed.
items.opened_state_description: a rusty iron trapdoor in the middle of the floor. The trap door is open.

items.name: ladder
items.description: a magic ladder hums with soft blue light.
items.examine_string: it glitters with soft blue light. Runes crawl up the rungs like fireflies trapped in glass.
items.get_refuse_string: The ladder is firmly anchored to the floor and ceiling.

containers.name: bag
containers.open_action_description: You unfold the top of the greasy lunch bag.
containers.close_action_description: You fold the top of the greasy lunch bag shut.
containers.opened_state_description: a greasy brown lunch bag with its top unfolded open.
containers.closed_state_description: a greasy brown lunch bag with its top folded shut.

items.name: carrot
items.speak_string: The carrot is flattered by your attention, but doesn't understand a word you said. It cheerfully waves hello!
items.eaten_success_string: The cheery orange carrot SCREAMS as you force it down your hideous throat. His screams die out to a gurgle as he is driven into the pit of your greedy stomach.

items.name: lamp
items.description: a battered and dull brass lamp
items.rub_success_string: The lamp grows shiny from rubbing.
items.rubbed_state_description: a battered and shiny brass lamp.

items.name: lighter
items.ignite_success_string: You flick the lighter and a small flame appears.

up.go_refuse_string: You can't walk that direction, did you mean to climb the ladder?

rooms.name: Blank Chamber
rooms.description: in an oddly empty room with smooth stone walls. You see a large mural of an imposing Djinni on the west wall.
rooms.dark_description: It is pitch dark. You can't see anything.

features.name: mural
features.description: it depicts an imposing Djinni with unsettlingly lifelike eyes that seem to follow your movements.

rooms.name: Colossal Cave
rooms.description: in a colossal cave opens before you, its jewel-studded walls shimmering in reflected light. A large crystal blue pool lies to the west - you can just make out a narrow ledge on the other side.

west.go_refuse_string: There is a large pool of water blocking your way west, although you do see a narrow ledge on the other side.

rooms.name: Pool Ledge
rooms.description: on a narrow ledge across the pool.
rooms.dark_description: It is pitch dark. You can't see anything.

containers.name: wardrobe
containers.open_action_description: You pull the heavy wardrobe doors open with a long creak.
containers.close_action_description: You push the wardrobe doors shut.
containers.opened_state_description: a large wooden wardrobe standing open, packed tightly with old overcoats. Faint, diffuse light seems to filter through from behind them.
containers.closed_state_description: a large wooden wardrobe with its heavy doors closed.
containers.examine_string: An old, oversized wooden wardrobe. The doors look stiff, but usable.

east.go_refuse_string: There is a large pool of water blocking your way east, although you do see solid ground on the other side.

rooms.name: Narnia
rooms.description: in a silent snowy wood lit by old lamppost light and drifting snow.

rooms.name: Demo Landing
rooms.description: in Demo Land on a floating stone platform. A ladder opening leads down into the tower cell below.

rooms.name: Ravine Edge
rooms.description: at the edge of a steep ravine. A narrow stream glitters faintly at the bottom.

items.name: hook
items.description: an iron hook firmly anchored into the rock at the ravine's edge
items.examine_string: This massive iron hook appears as though it could bear a lot of weight.
items.is_tied_to_string: a long sturdy rope is tied securly to the hook and dangles down over the edge of the ravine

features.name: ravine
features.description: a sheer drop into a rocky gorge with a fast rushing stream running along its bottom.

features.name: stream
features.description: a narrow ribbon of water glinting far below

down.refuse_string: The ravine wall is too steep - you may need to prepare some equipment.
down.go_refuse_string: You can't go that way - there's a sheer cliff you need to scale.

rooms.name: Clover Rest
rooms.description: beside a pleasant stream that winds gently through a bed of soft clover. Sunlight filters down the ravine walls in shifting ribbons, and the air is cool and peaceful.

features.name: stream
features.description: a clear, gentle stream flowing over smooth stones

features.name: clover
features.description: a thick bed of soft green clover that looks surprisingly comfortable

features.name: ravine walls
features.description: tall stone walls rising steeply above you, too narrow to climb without help

up.refuse_string: The ravine wall is too steep - you may need to prepare some equipment.
up.go_refuse_string: You can't go that way - there's a sheer cliff you need to scale.

rooms.name: Whispering Grove
rooms.description: in a grove where tall silver trees lean close and seem to murmur old secrets whenever the wind shifts.

rooms.name: Mirror Hall
rooms.description: in a long hall of black glass reflects scenes that do not quite match your movements.

rooms.name: Clockwork Court
rooms.description: in a court where bronze gears turn beneath crystal floor panels, ticking in perfect rhythm with distant bells.

rooms.name: Lantern Overlook
rooms.description: in a place where hundreds of hanging lanterns drift over a sheer drop, painting moving constellations in the mist.
